cases.prompt: Investigate mechanisms of adaptive immunity in Streptococcus pyogenes.
cases.ground_truth_discovery: CRISPR-Cas9 can be programmed with RNA for DNA cleavage.

cases.prompt: Determine the optimal neural network architecture for predicting 3D protein structures from amino acid sequences.
cases.ground_truth_discovery: Attention mechanisms (transformers) applied to spatial graphs significantly outperform CNNs for protein folding.
